subcodes.first_line: O twin stars of the horizon of the love of God! Praise be unto God that these two brothers are even as the twin stars of Gemini [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو فرقدان افق محبت الله حمد خدا را که آن دو برادر مانند دو پیکر یعنی جوزا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation
